chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-5991 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.26604/2024 2. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- This matter was last taken up almost one year ago. In the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, despite the petitioner’s name appearing in the cause list is called absent without any intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
